channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.23 (Build 20260608)
item.description:
What's New

fix(safari): handle address bar type-ahead for Vietnamese input

On the Safari Start Page (and when no editable field is focused), Safari

routes keystrokes to the address bar without moving AX focus to the URL

field. The focused element stays AXWindow/AXList, so isSafariAddressBar()

returned false and detection fell back to the default fast method, whose

plain backspace deleted the autocomplete suggestion instead of the typed

character (e.g. "caau" rendered as "caau" with a misplaced mark).

Treat type-ahead context (role nil/AXWindow/AXList/AXCollectionList) as the

address bar and inject via the empty-char-prefix technique (.fast + U+202F),

matching Chromium/Firefox. Bump build number to 20260608.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
